name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Secaucus, NJ location of OneMain Financial at 700 Plaza Dr offers personal loans.
description_long:
OneMain Financial's Secaucus, NJ branch is located at 700 Plaza Dr, Suite 211, providing personal lending services to the local community. Open Monday through Friday with convenient hours (8:30 AM–5:30 PM on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays; 9 AM–5:30 PM on Tuesdays and Thursdays), the Secaucus office is closed on weekends. This standalone location serves residents and businesses in Secaucus seeking accessible financing solutions.

The Secaucus OneMain Financial office specializes in personal loans for various financial needs, from consolidation to home improvements. Staff at this location can discuss loan amounts, terms, and rates tailored to your situation. Call 201-864-2469 to speak with a loan officer at the Secaucus branch directly, or visit in person to explore your options.

If you're a Secaucus resident exploring personal loan options, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and bank statements to your appointment. OneMain Financial's straightforward approach to lending means quick decisions and accessible terms for qualified applicants. The Secaucus location welcomes walk-ins and appointments during business hours.
pros: Over 100 years in business — established, regulated lender with long track record
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no surprise payment changes over the loan term
No prepayment penalties — pay off early with no additional fees
SpeedFunds enables funding in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
Pre-qualification check available online with no credit score impact
Both secured and unsecured loan options ($1,500–$30,000)
In-branch specialists with after-hours appointments available
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is high — near credit card territory for less creditworthy borrowers
Minimum loan of $1,500 rules out very small borrowing needs
Maximum of $30,000 is lower than some competitors for larger financing needs
Branch-centric model may limit accessibility for borrowers in areas without nearby locations
Rate range is wide (11.99%–35.99%), meaning actual rate depends heavily on individual credit profile
best_for: Borrowers with fair or imperfect credit who need $1,500–$30,000
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance from a loan specialist
People consolidating high-interest debt into a single fixed monthly payment
Borrowers needing emergency funds quickly via same-day SpeedFunds disbursement
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best suited for borrowers with fair or below-average credit who need a mid-size installment loan ($1,500–$30,000) and value in-person service or same-day funding. The main caveat is cost — rates up to 35.99% APR mean borrowers with good credit should comparison-shop online lenders first, as they are likely to qualify for significantly lower rates elsewhere.
meta_description: Secaucus, NJ OneMain Financial at 700 Plaza Dr. Personal loans with flexible terms.
